name: Prevention's Parsley-Laden Tabbouleh
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the chopped parsley, tomatoes, scallions, celery, and mint.
2. Add the prepared bulgur to the bowl with the herbs.
3. Drizzle the extra virgin olive oil over the mixture.
4. Pour in the fresh lemon juice.
5. Sprinkle allspice and black pepper evenly across the ingredients.
6. Gently toss everything together until well combined.
